name: X Daily Monitor
note: Self-contained (Data Table backed) rebuild. Live at https://saiprashanth-ai.app.n8n.cloud/workflow/tLiZYdMrmpWGHyr2 -- that live workflow is the source of truth; use n8n's own Export (... menu > Download) if you need a fresher copy of this file.

parameters.jsCode:
const handleItem = $('Normalize Baseline').item.json;
return [{ json: { handle: handleItem.handle, display_name: handleItem.display_name, has_baseline: false, tweet_count_today: 0, viral_hits: [], cadence_anomaly: false, new_format_flags: [], error: 'apify_fetch_failed' } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { "model": "llama-3.3-70b-versatile", "temperature": 0, "response_format": { "type": "json_object" }, "messages": [ { "role": "system", "content": "You classify tweets against an account's established content formats. Respond ONLY with strict JSON: {\"verdicts\": [{\"id\": string, \"is_new_format\": boolean, \"label\": string, \"rationale\": string}]}." }, { "role": "user", "content": "Known formats: " + JSON.stringify($json.known_formats) + ". Known hooks: " + JSON.stringify($json.known_hooks) + ". Classify each tweet: " + JSON.stringify($json.ambiguous_tweets) } ] } }}

parameters.jsCode:
const ctx = $('Detect Outliers').item.json;
return [{ json: Object.assign({}, ctx, { new_format_flags: [], groq_error: true }) }];

const alerts = $input.all().map(i => i.json);
return [{ json: { alerts, run_date: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) } }];
